heading: Guarantee and commitment to guarantee loans
label: 2009g Guarantee and commitment to guarantee loans

children.heading: “Eligible public entity” defined
children.label: a “Eligible public entity” defined
children.text: In this section, the term “eligible public entity” means any unit of general local government.

children.heading: Guarantee and commitment
children.label: b Guarantee and commitment
children.text: The Secretary, on such terms and conditions as the Secretary may prescribe, may guarantee and make commitments to guarantee notes or other obligations issued by eligible public entities, or by public agencies designated by the eligible public entities, for the purposes of financing rural development activities authorized and funded under .section 2009f of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary may not make a guarantee or commitment to guarantee with respect to a note or other obligation if the total amount of outstanding notes or obligations guaranteed under this section (excluding any amount repaid under the contract entered into under subsection (e)(1)(A)) for issuers in the State would exceed an amount equal to 5 times the sum of the total amount of grants made to the State under .section 2009f of this title

children.heading: Payment of principal, interest, and costs
children.label: d Payment of principal, interest, and costs
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this subchapter, a State to which a grant is made under may use the grant (including program income derived from the grant) to pay principal and interest due (including such servicing, underwriting, or other costs as may be specified in regulations of the Secretary) on any note or other obligation guaranteed under this section.section 2009f of this title

children.label: A
children.text: enter into a contract, in a form acceptable to the Secretary, for repayment of notes or other obligations guaranteed under this section;

children.label: B
children.text: pledge any grant for which the issuer may become eligible under this subchapter; and

children.label: C
children.text: furnish, at the discretion of the Secretary, such other security as may be considered appropriate by the Secretary in making the guarantees.

children.heading: Security
children.label: 2 Security
children.text: To assist in ensuring the repayment of notes or other obligations and charges incurred under this section, a State shall pledge any grant for which the State may become eligible under this subchapter as security for notes or other obligations and charges issued under this section by any eligible public entity in the State.

children.heading: Pledged grants for repayments
children.label: f Pledged grants for repayments
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this subchapter, the Secretary may apply grants pledged pursuant to paragraphs (1)(B) and (2) of subsection (e) to any repayments due the United States as a result of the guarantees.

children.heading: Outstanding obligations
children.label: g Outstanding obligations
children.text: The total amount of outstanding obligations guaranteed on a cumulative basis by the Secretary pursuant to subsection (b) shall not at any time exceed such amount as may be authorized to be appropriated for such purpose for any fiscal year.

children.heading: Purchase of guaranteed obligations by Federal Financing Bank
children.label: h Purchase of guaranteed obligations by Federal Financing Bank
children.text: Notes or other obligations guaranteed under this section may not be purchased by the Federal Financing Bank.

children.heading: Full faith and credit
children.label: i Full faith and credit
children.text: The full faith and credit of the United States is pledged to the payment of all guarantees made under this section. Any such guarantee made by the Secretary shall be conclusive evidence of the eligibility of the obligations for the guarantee with respect to principal and interest. The validity of the guarantee shall be incontestable in the hands of a holder of the guaranteed obligations.
